title: Shuttle Art 106 Piece Deluxe Art Set, Art Supplies in Wooden Case, Painting Drawing Art Kit with Pencils Oil Pastels Watercolour Cakes Colouring Book Sketch Pad for Kids Adults
features: ALL-IN-ONE WOODEN ART SET: Shuttle Art 106 piece deluxe art set contains crayons, coloured pencils, oil pastels, watercolour cakes, together with versatile drawing supplies such as eraser, sharpeners, palette, sandpaper, paint brushes and 3 kinds of art papers, complete painting, drawing & art supplies meet your diverse drawing demands

GIFTABLE ART SUPPLIES KIT: Packaged in a beautiful gift box, perfect for boys and girls ages 4-12 to explore their curiosity. Whether it’s a birthday, Christmas, or a special achievement, this art kit is a wonderful way to show your support for their artistic journey and nurture their talent

PORTABLE & STURDY WOODEN ART BOX: Portable wooden box with handy handle, easy to carry and use, allows you to unleash your creativity whenever and wherever you want. And all the art supplies stored in a sturdy wooden art case, with individual slots for each art stuff, which protects them from damage and helps you organize and choose them more efficiently
NON-TOXIC & SAFE：The tools in this art set are made of environmental material, and all the parts of this drawing set are non-toxic, safe for use by both adults and kids

SERVICE GUARANTEE: Your satisfaction is our top priority, please rest assured to purchase our products. If you are not satisfied with our products or have any questions, please feel free to contact us at any time
description: Product Description PERFECT GIFT & CONVENIENT STORAGE Perfect Gift Whether for birthdays, holidays, or any special occasion, this set will inspire and delight, providing kids with hours of artistic exploration. Easy Storage Comes with a sturdy wooden box, featuring precisely - cut individual slots that ensure every crayon, pencil, and brush stays securely in place and within easy reach. KIDS’ COLOURING TOOLS & LITTLE ARTISTS’ PAINTS Creating with Colouring Tools Let kids explore a world of artistic expression with multiple drawing mediums. The set includes colored pencils for precision detailing, and oil pastels for a rich, creamy texture. Crafting with Diverse Pads Unleash young artists' creativity with a set of specialty pads. Sketchbooks capture ideas, watercolour pads bring colours to life, colouring books spark fantasy, and drawing pads enable style exploration.
